---
title: "Shiny App Launch"
subtitle: "Static launch page for local or deployed Shiny access"
author: "Group Project Starter"
date: "2026-03-31"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{r}
shiny_app_url <- Sys.getenv("SHINY_APP_URL", unset = "http://127.0.0.1:3838")
is_local_target <- grepl("127\\.0\\.1|localhost", shiny_app_url)
```

## Launch Target

Current target:

`r shiny_app_url`

- Mode: `r if (is_local_target) "Local development" else "External deployment"`
- Recommended website entry page: [app-guide.qmd](../app-guide.qmd)

## Open The App

[Open the Shiny app](`r shiny_app_url`){target="_blank"}

## Local Run Command

```r
shiny::runApp("app")
```

Or from the project root:

```powershell
Rscript run_app.R 3838
```

## Deployment Note

For Netlify plus `shinyapps.io`, set `SHINY_APP_URL` to the deployed app before rendering the website so the launch button points to the public target instead of localhost.
